name: Aquarium Set
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水舞台装置</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アクアリウム・セット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All WATER monsters you control gain 300 ATK/DEF. All "Aquaactress" monsters you control gain 300 ATK/DEF. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 Aqua monster in your GY; Special Summon it, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Aqua monsters.
eff: All WATER monsters you control gain 300 ATK/DEF. All "Aquaactress" monsters you control gain 300 ATK/DEF. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 Aqua monster in your GY; Special Summon it, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Aqua monsters.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Destiny Version

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
